title: Mystic Mekkan Mod
description: A whole new world to discover, find new ores, new mobs and new gear!
body:
The Mystic Mekkan mod is a remake and continuation of the Mekkan Mod, I seek to get all the features from version 0.6.0 and revamp+retexture them while simaltainusly adding new content, many things from the old description are still true so thats why i've left it in.

Most recent version showcase: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Xd5da5cr7tc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




Old description:

The Mekkan Mod is an exciting project that I’ve been dreaming about creating for years! This mod aims to enhance the game by introducing a brand new dimension known as "Mekkan Origin." Within this expansive new realm, players will encounter a plethora of unique features, One of the standout elements of the Mekkan Mod is the introduction of new ores, which players will discover throughout their adventures in this dimension. These ores will not only expand the crafting possibilities but will also enrich the overall exploration experience.

In addition to the new resources, Mekkan Origin is home to a variety of distinctive biomes, each with its own atmosphere, flora, and fauna. Players can expect to see beautifully rendered landscapes and thriving ecosystems that provide a vibrant backdrop for their journey (NOT IMPLEMENTED) 


Disclaimer: Please note that this mod is still a work in progress.
